rag_rules: Preserve the upstream scope decision: keep type-level AGREE content in the component type and implementation-level AGREE content in the component implementation.
Insert AGREE content as a complete `annex agree {** ... **};` block, or merge it into an existing AGREE annex without changing surrounding AADL structure.
generic_rules: Use the analyzed AADL model as the authority for owners and existing declarations; preserve names and ownership exactly during fusion.
When fusing into an implementation, keep the annex after the structural declarations it depends on and leave subcomponents, connections, and properties unchanged.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Maintain valid annex delimiters and AADL terminators exactly: `annex agree {** ... **};` inside the chosen owner.
anti_patterns: Do not move content across type/implementation scope boundaries or infer a new owner from clause text alone.
Do not modify ports, connections, subcomponents, or property associations just to accommodate the annex.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
